training_status: Gym 5x/week with 30min cardio 5x/week; previously lifted ~2 years inconsistently, then 1 year break before restarting with Reta

benefits.description: Lost approximately 50 lbs over 3 months, going from 220 lbs to 170 lbs
Pre-existing gynecomastia visibly improving/flattening since starting Retatrutide and losing weight

protocol_notes: Started at 1mg/week, increased to 2mg/week (1mg twice weekly) after approximately 1.5 months. Calorie deficit of 1200-1500 kcal/day. No steroids or TRT used.
